ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., Studio, Live) */,
  "tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album (e.g., Folk, Acid) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the album */,
  "album_label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the album */,
  "album_producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "album_artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the album artwork */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the album */,
  "album_formats" TEXT /* Formats available (e.g., CD, Vinyl, Digital) */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Exact date the album was released */,
  "album_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "album_explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album it belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "track_lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "track_composers" TEXT /* Composers of the track */,
  "track_writers" TEXT /* Writers of the track */,
  "track_producers" TEXT /* Producers of the track */,
  "track_artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the track artwork */,
  "track_explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "artist_record_label" TEXT /* The record label associated with the artist */,
  "artist_awards" TEXT /* List of awards the artist has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_artists" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the artist in the album (e.g., lead vocalist, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "genre_parent" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, critic, admin) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the user's social media profile */,
  "user_birthday" TEXT /* User's birthday */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private) */,
  "playlist_artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the album */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review of the album */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rating was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album that was listened to */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album was listened to */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has listened to the album */,
  "last_listened_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the album was listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "review_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "review_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
